title: GlossaryDraft
description: Output of bin/scaffold-glossary.sh --json. Lists the exported types the detector found in the target repo, the languages it scanned, and bookkeeping counts. Consumed by scaffold-docs.sh / the bootstrap-project skill to write the auto block of docs/glossary.md.

scanned_files.description: Count of source files inspected. `git ls-files` constrains the set so untracked build artefacts don't inflate the count.

total_candidates.description: Number of distinct exported types detected before the max_terms cap was applied.

selected.description: Number of terms in `terms[]` after sorting by external reference count and truncating to `max_terms`.

languages.description: Languages the detector actually walked (after resolving `auto` against the stack).

kind.description: Per-language declarator (struct, interface, type, class, enum, trait, protocol).

defined_in.description: Repo-relative path of the file where the type is declared.

used_in.description: Repo-relative paths where the term is referenced outside its own definition file. Capped to a small head set to keep the draft compact.

reference_count.description: Total external references — drives the ranking that the cap applies to.
